description: Flipping package type globally to fix one import
body:
Changing package.json type from commonjs to module or back can change every .js file under that package and break scripts, tests, or consumers. Treat this as a do-not-use signal unless the task is an explicit module migration with full validation. Safer path: patch the local boundary, use .mjs/.cjs where appropriate, or adjust the specific export.

Use only as a diagnostic do-not-use signal; do not expose this as positive strategy, methodology, knowledge, skill, or memory.
